actual:
"...is to completely abandon that line of thinking right now."

The attorney leaned back, his expression hardening into one of strict professionalism. "Let me be absolutely clear: I will not counsel you to break the law, nor will I participate in perjury, witness tampering, or the destruction of evidence. If you want to go down that path, you will need to find other representation, and you will almost certainly end up facing additional, more severe charges."

He tapped his pen against the legal pad on the table, lowering his voice to a steady, serious register. "The actual best way to win this case is to out-prepare opposing counsel and dismantle their narrative using the rules of evidence. 

"First, we are going to file a motion to suppress the communications they obtained, as the scope of their discovery request was overly broad and arguably violated your expectation of privacy. Second, we are going to focus entirely on the credibility of their key witness. We already have prior sworn statements where his timeline contradicts the physical evidence.
